generated_oml:
instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor configurations capturing operational data from physical assets for iteratively improving control policies"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance OperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for building asset representation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with runtime semantics (sensor configurations, control logic) and real-time operational data integrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, forming a semantic backbone for spatial and functional representation of building assets"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems for control signal feedback to physical systems"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control Systems defined in BIM environment to enable control signal feedback to BCS"
]

instance AECOLivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure in the AECO domain, demonstrated through a Living Lab case study, serving as a unified virtual representation for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of physical assets"
    base:contains PostOccupancySensor, BCSActuator, BCSController, BuildingBIMModel
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device management and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, SimulationService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management and data synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, SimulationService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization in facility management"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven Engineering for automating domain semantics extraction and runtime interface generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for automating domain semantics extraction and runtime interface generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building infrastructure operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building systems for life cycle optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort optimization and maintenance planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortOptimizationInsight, MaintenancePlanningInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization via reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for energy efficiency optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for visual comfort optimization"
]

instance MaintenancePlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for maintenance planning"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status monitoring of building systems"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for life cycle optimization"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insights for facility management"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals transmitted from the digital twin to the Building Control Systems (BCS) through bidirectional communication facilitated by Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for immediate feedback and control, as specified by 'live synchronization between physical assets and digital twins' using Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework integrating BIM models, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, and modular services with standardized extension points to support scalable, service-oriented DT development in AECO."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle phases from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment, enabling continuous optimization throughout the building's lifespan as stated in 'complete building life cycle, from initial design to refurbishments and adaptations during operation'."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess the accuracy and interoperability of the DT relative to its physical counterpart, as demonstrated in the Living Lab case study evaluation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication between physical and virtual components via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous models and fragmented data landscapes through standardized integration frameworks to enable seamless communication with external Building Control Systems and IoT platforms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM as a standard for AECO-specific systems and standardized integration frameworks to address fragmented data sources and domain-specific workflows."
]
